disclaimer.title: Important: Not Legal Advice
disclaimer.body: LegAIDoc is a document generation tool and does not provide legal advice. The templates and documents generated by this service are for informational and reference purposes only. They do not constitute legal advice and should not be relied upon as such. Every legal situation is unique — you should consult a qualified attorney licensed in your jurisdiction before executing any document or taking any action based on documents generated here.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using LegAIDoc, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the service.

service.title: 2. Description of Service
service.body: LegAIDoc provides customisable document templates and an automated generation tool to help users draft legal documents. LegAIDoc is not a law firm and does not employ licensed attorneys. The service does not create an attorney-client relationship between you and LegAIDoc.

userResponsibilities.title: 3. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.body: You are solely responsible for verifying that any document generated through this service meets the legal requirements applicable to your specific situation, jurisdiction, and circumstances. Do not use documents generated here as a substitute for professional legal counsel.

limitation.title: 4. Limitation of Liability
limitation.body: To the maximum extent permitted by law, LegAIDoc shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of, or inability to use, this service or any documents generated through it. Use of this service is entirely at your own risk.

privacy.title: 5. Privacy
privacy.body: Your use of LegAIDoc is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these terms by reference.

changes.title: 6. Changes to Terms
changes.body: LegAIDoc reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.
